narratives.evidence_quote: इससे रूस-यूक्रेन युद्ध एक बार फिर भड़क सकता है।
narratives.reasoning: This direct statement predicts that the G7 aid will cause the war to 'flare up again,' evoking fear of escalation and heightened conflict.

narratives.evidence_quote: पुतिन ने रूसी संप्रभुता के खतरे में आने पर परमाणु हथियारों के इस्तेमाल से भी इनकार नहीं किया है।
narratives.reasoning: This mention of potential nuclear weapons use is designed to elicit fear and anxiety about catastrophic consequences, fitting the definition of amplifying war-related fears.

narratives.evidence_quote: यह देश यूक्रेन को स्टैंड-ऑफ लॉन्ग रेंज क्रूज मिसाइलों और एयर लॉन्च व्हीकल के माध्यम से रूसी क्षेत्र में आक्रामक कदम उठाने में मदद करने कर रहे हैं।
narratives.reasoning: This statement frames Western military aid as enabling Ukraine to take 'aggressive steps' into Russian territory, criticizing the West's role in escalating the conflict and portraying its actions negatively.

narratives.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narratives.evidence_quote: फिलहाल वैश्विक स्थिति अस्थिर दिख रही है।
narratives.reasoning: This statement highlights a negative outcome (global instability) as a consequence of the ongoing conflict and Western involvement, aligning with the narrative of predicting adverse outcomes for Western interests and global order.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Amplifying war-related fears: There is a real possibility that nuclear weapons will be employed
subnarratives.evidence_quote: पुतिन ने रूसी संप्रभुता के खतरे में आने पर परमाणु हथियारों के इस्तेमाल से भी इनकार नहीं किया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly evokes fear about the potential use of nuclear weapons by Russia in response to perceived threats, aligning with the subnarrative's definition of creating anxiety about nuclear escalation.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: इससे रूस-यूक्रेन युद्ध एक बार फिर भड़क सकता है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement, along with others like 'आने वाले दिनों में यूक्रेन मोर्चे पर तनाव और बढ़ जाने की आशंका है' and 'फिलहाल वैश्विक स्थिति अस्थिर दिख रही है', amplifies general war-related fears of escalation and global instability due to the new G7 aid, supporting the parent narrative but not fitting a more specific subnarrative.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Amplifying war-related fears: There is a real possibility that nuclear weapons will be employed
subnarratives.evidence_quote: पुतिन ने रूसी संप्रभुता के खतरे में आने पर परमाणु हथियारों के इस्तेमाल से भी इनकार नहीं किया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly evokes fear about the potential use of nuclear weapons by Russia, stating that Putin has not ruled out their use if Russian sovereignty is threatened. This aligns with the subnarrative's definition of evoking fear or anxiety about nuclear weapon use.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: इससे रूस-यूक्रेन युद्ध एक बार फिर भड़क सकता है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement, along with others like 'आने वाले दिनों में यूक्रेन मोर्चे पर तनाव और बढ़ जाने की आशंका है' and 'फिलहाल वैश्विक स्थिति अस्थिर दिख रही है', amplifies general war-related fears by suggesting the G7 aid will re-ignite or escalate the conflict and increase global instability. This supports the parent narrative but does not fit the specific definitions of WWIII, Russia attacking other countries, or NATO intervention.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The West is overreacting
subnarratives.evidence_quote: इससे रूस-यूक्रेन युद्ध एक बार फिर भड़क सकता है।
subnarratives.reasoning: The statement frames the substantial Western aid package (50 billion USD, long-range missiles) as a disproportionate action that could dangerously escalate or 'reignite' the war, implying the West's reaction is excessive and destabilizing.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यह देश यूक्रेन को स्टैंड-ऑफ लॉन्ग रेंज क्रूज मिसाइलों और एयर लॉन्च व्हीकल के माध्यम से रूसी क्षेत्र में आक्रामक कदम उठाने में मदद करने कर रहे हैं।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote supports the parent narrative by portraying Western nations not as defensive supporters but as active enablers of Ukrainian aggression into Russian territory, which discredits the nature and intent of Western diplomatic and military support.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: इससे रूस-यूक्रेन युद्ध एक बार फिर भड़क सकता है।
subnarratives.reasoning: The text directly states that the substantial Western aid (the G7's $50 billion and long-range missiles) could cause the Russia-Ukraine war to 'flare up again,' framing the Western action as a catalyst for dangerous escalation, which is a negative consequence of Western policy.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: अधिकारियों के अनुसार, आने वाले दिनों में यूक्रेन मोर्चे पर तनाव और बढ़ जाने की आशंका है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote explicitly links the provision of specific Western weapons (Storm Shadow/SCALP missiles, HIMARS, ATACMS) to an anticipated increase in tension on the front, presenting a direct negative consequence of the West's military support.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: फिलहाल वैश्विक स्थिति अस्थिर दिख रही है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement generalizes the instability, implicitly connecting it to the context of the Ukraine war and Western involvement, thereby suggesting that Western actions contribute to global instability—a broad negative consequence.
